packages.name: firebase/php-jwt

suggest.paragonie\/sodium_compat: Support EdDSA (Ed25519) signatures when libsodium is not present

packages.description: A simple library to encode and decode JSON Web Tokens (JWT) in PHP. Should conform to the current spec.

suggest.phpseclib\/phpseclib: May be used in place of OpenSSL for signing strings or for token management. Please require version ^2.

packages.name: google/cloud-core

suggest.opis\/closure: May be used to serialize closures to process jobs in the batch daemon. Please require version ^3.
suggest.symfony\/lock: Required for the Spanner cached based session pool. Please require the following commit: 3.3.x-dev#1ba6ac9

packages.description: Google Cloud PHP shared dependency, providing functionality useful to all components.

suggest.google\/cloud-pubsub: May be used to register a topic to receive bucket notifications.
suggest.phpseclib\/phpseclib: May be used in place of OpenSSL for creating signed Cloud Storage URLs. Please require version ^2.

packages.description: Google API Common Protos for PHP

suggest.ext-protobuf: For better performance, install the protobuf C extension.
suggest.google\/protobuf: To get started using grpc quickly, install the native protobuf library.

suggest.ext-intl: Required for Internationalized Domain Name (IDN) support
suggest.psr\/log: Required for using the Log middleware

packages.description: Guzzle is a PHP HTTP client library

packages.name: monolog/monolog

suggest.aws\/aws-sdk-php: Allow sending log messages to AWS services like DynamoDB
suggest.doctrine\/couchdb: Allow sending log messages to a CouchDB server
suggest.elasticsearch\/elasticsearch: Allow sending log messages to an Elasticsearch server via official client
suggest.ext-amqp: Allow sending log messages to an AMQP server (1.0+ required)
suggest.ext-curl: Required to send log messages using the IFTTTHandler, the LogglyHandler, the SendGridHandler, the SlackWebhookHandler or the TelegramBotHandler
suggest.ext-mbstring: Allow to work properly with unicode symbols
suggest.ext-mongodb: Allow sending log messages to a MongoDB server (via driver)
suggest.ext-openssl: Required to send log messages using SSL
suggest.ext-sockets: Allow sending log messages to a Syslog server (via UDP driver)
suggest.graylog2\/gelf-php: Allow sending log messages to a GrayLog2 server
suggest.mongodb\/mongodb: Allow sending log messages to a MongoDB server (via library)
suggest.php-amqplib\/php-amqplib: Allow sending log messages to an AMQP server using php-amqplib
suggest.rollbar\/rollbar: Allow sending log messages to Rollbar
suggest.ruflin\/elastica: Allow sending log messages to an Elastic Search server

packages.description: Sends your logs to files, sockets, inboxes, databases and various web services

packages.name: psr/http-factory
packages.description: PSR-17: Common interfaces for PSR-7 HTTP message factories

packages.name: ramsey/collection
packages.description: A PHP library for representing and manipulating collections.

packages.name: ramsey/uuid

suggest.ext-bcmath: Enables faster math with arbitrary-precision integers using BCMath.
suggest.ext-gmp: Enables faster math with arbitrary-precision integers using GMP.
suggest.ext-uuid: Enables the use of PeclUuidTimeGenerator and PeclUuidRandomGenerator.
suggest.paragonie\/random-lib: Provides RandomLib for use with the RandomLibAdapter
suggest.ramsey\/uuid-doctrine: Allows the use of Ramsey\Uuid\Uuid as Doctrine field type.

packages.description: A PHP library for generating and working with universally unique identifiers (UUIDs).

packages.name: rize/uri-template
packages.description: PHP URI Template (RFC 6570) supports both expansion & extraction
